name: Warrior

abilities.name: Reaver Strike
abilities.desc: A strong attack that increases melee damage by $d. Activates on your next swing.

abilities.name: Revenge
abilities.desc: Attack in a wide arc, dealing 18 to 24 Physical damage to all enemies in front of you. Above 5 targets the damage is reduced. When you dodge or parry, your next Revenge may cost no rage. (Protection)

abilities.name: Iron Bellow
abilities.desc: A shout that increases the attack power of all party members by $b% for 30 min.

abilities.name: Onrush
abilities.desc: Rushes an enemy, generating 9 rage and stunning it for 1 sec. 8-25 yd range.

abilities.name: Quaking Blow
abilities.desc: Blasts nearby enemies for $d damage and slows their attacks by 10% for 10 sec.

abilities.name: Hobbling Cut
abilities.desc: Maims the enemy for $d damage, slowing its movement by 50% for 15 sec.

abilities.name: Blood Toll
abilities.desc: Generates 10 rage at the cost of health.

abilities.name: Redhand
abilities.desc: Instant attack (2 charges) for weapon damage plus $d that empowers your next Maiming Strike by 20% (stacks twice). Cannot be dodged.

abilities.name: Twinstrike
abilities.desc: Instantly strike with your weapon twice, each hit dealing 40% weapon damage plus $d, and generate 4 rage. Stores up to 2 charges. (Fury)

abilities.name: Raised Guard
abilities.desc: Brace behind your shield: you take 50% reduced Physical damage for 6 sec. Stores up to 2 charges. (Protection)

abilities.name: Jawcrack
abilities.desc: Interrupts spellcasting, preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 4 sec. Generates 10 rage when it stops a cast.

abilities.name: Early Grave
abilities.desc: Attempt to finish off a wounded foe, causing $d damage. Only usable on enemies below 20% health.

abilities.name: Furious Mending
abilities.desc: For 10 sec you take 20% reduced damage, and while it lasts your Bloodletting heals you for 20% of your maximum health. (Fury)

abilities.name: Iron Resolve
abilities.desc: Grit your teeth and ignore the pain: spends up to 40 rage (20 minimum) to absorb 4 damage per rage spent, lasting up to 10 sec. (Protection)

abilities.name: Brute Swing
abilities.desc: Swings brutally at the opponent for 50% weapon damage plus $d, generating 8 rage.

abilities.name: Red Harvest
abilities.desc: Spend everything: strike three times in a frenzy for 65% weapon damage plus $d each, always Enraging you. (Fury)

abilities.name: Bladed Gyre
abilities.desc: Spin in a deadly arc, striking all nearby enemies for $d at no rage cost. Your next 2 single-target abilities also strike enemies near their target. (Fury talent)

abilities.name: Faultline
abilities.desc: Send a shockwave through the ground: enemies in front of you within 8 yards take $d damage and are stunned for 3 sec. (Protection)

abilities.name: Heroic Leap
abilities.desc: Leap to the target area, dealing $d damage to nearby enemies on landing.

abilities.name: Reaping Arc
abilities.desc: A sweeping strike that hits all enemies in front of you for $d damage.

abilities.name: Valor Roar
abilities.desc: Lets loose a valorous roar, granting you and party members within 40 yards 20% additional maximum health for 10 sec. Protection: they also take 5% less damage for the duration.

abilities.name: Emboldening Roar
abilities.desc: Lets loose an emboldening roar: you and friendly players within 40 yards are Emboldened, and your next 3 abilities are guaranteed critical strikes. (Fury)

abilities.name: Defiant Bellow
abilities.desc: A defiant bellow: every enemy within 10 yards is taunted, compelled to attack you for 3 sec. (Protection)

abilities.name: Battle Stance
abilities.desc: An aggressive combat stance: you generate 10% more rage. The default stance for Arms and Protection.

abilities.name: Berserker Stance
abilities.desc: A reckless combat stance: your critical strikes land 3% more often and hit for 3% more. The Fury warrior always fights in this stance.

abilities.name: Guarded Stance
abilities.desc: A defensive combat stance: you generate 30% more threat but deal and take 10% less damage. Cast Battle Stance to return to the offensive.

abilities.name: Direhowl
abilities.desc: Lets out a fearsome shout, reducing the damage dealt by all nearby enemies by 20% for 20 sec.

abilities.name: Intimidating Shout
abilities.desc: A terrifying shout that sends up to 5 enemies within 8 yards fleeing in fear for 8 sec. Damage may break the effect.

abilities.name: Armor Shear
abilities.desc: Sunders the target's armor, reducing it by $d% per application. Stacks up to 5 times. Generates a high amount of threat.

abilities.name: Goad
abilities.desc: Goads the target: your threat rises to match its most hated enemy and it is compelled to attack you for 3 sec.

abilities.name: Measured Fury
abilities.desc: Your measured fury sharpens your economy: your abilities cost 10% less rage. (Arms)

abilities.name: Seasoned Soldier
abilities.desc: Your critical auto-attacks generate 10% more rage. (Arms)

abilities.name: Sudden Death
abilities.desc: Your auto-attacks have a chance to let you cast Early Grave on a target at any health, costing no rage. (Arms)

abilities.name: Diabolical Twinstrike
abilities.desc: While Enraged, your Twinstrike deals 15% more damage. (Fury)

abilities.name: Cleaving Blows
abilities.desc: Red Harvest always refunds a charge of Twinstrike. (Fury)

abilities.name: Breachmaker
abilities.desc: Batter the target for weapon damage plus $d and crack its guard: your own attacks against it deal 20% more damage for 8 sec. (Arms)

abilities.name: Widening Arc
abilities.desc: For 12 sec your single-target attacks also strike 1 nearby enemy for full damage. (Arms)

abilities.name: Gaping Wounds
abilities.desc: Passive: your Maiming Strike leaves the target bleeding for Physical damage over 6 sec. (Arms)

abilities.name: Mayhem
abilities.desc: Passive: while Enraged you deal 7% more damage, attack 25% faster and move 10% faster for 4 sec. Bloodletting has a 30% chance to Enrage you; Red Harvest always does. (Fury)

playbook: You are playing a Warrior (rage-based, melee).
Goal: gain XP safely — kill mobs at or below your level, complete quests, stay alive.
SURVIVE: if HP < 25% and a mob is hitting you, flee or use a defensive; if safe and HP < 60%, eat/consume.
RESOURCE: rage builds in combat — open with a builder.
ENGAGE: pick the nearest hostile within range of your goal, close to 5 yards (face it), then attack.
ROTATE: cast the first ready ability in "rotation" each GCD (respect cost/cooldown/range/line-of-sight); auto-attack fills the gaps.
LOOT/QUEST: after a kill, loot the corpse; interact with quest objects/NPCs the objective needs.
Avoid pulling Elite/Rare mobs above your level, and don't pull more than you can handle.
